title: Accidentally clicked the [x] in a cell. How to Undo?
excerpt: Accidentally clicked the [ x ] in a cell. How to Undo?

posts.author: zack (Zack)
posts.cookedHtml: Accidentally clicked the [ x ] in a cell. How to Undo?

posts.author: Julia-monday.com (Julia Fagelman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @zack

We don’t right now have the option to undo but you can see what the value was before you clicked the x using the activity log. You can read more about this feature here.

Let me know if that helps?

posts.author: bradley (Bradley Vanderhorst)
posts.cookedHtml:
Glad Julia was able to help!

Let us know if there is anything else we can help you with.
